overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves through covered commercial walkways, past graffiti-covered walls, and along busy streets with futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial pedestrian walkway with overhead transit structures

events.description: futuristic black vehicle drives past on the adjacent road to the right

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the covered commercial district, passing pedestrians and observing storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass transit structure covering the pedestrian walkway
distinctive orange diamond-patterned pedestrian walkway surface
large glowing digital advertisements suspended above the street
lit shop fronts with neon signage lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial walkway with distinctive orange pavement, surrounded by holographic billboards and neon-lit storefronts. Overhead transit structures block most of the sky while pedestrians walk in opposing directions and futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with graffiti-covered wall and construction barriers

events.description: character turns corner into narrower walkway with graffiti-covered wall on left side

agents.ego_description: character walking along a narrower path with a graffiti-covered wall on the left, passing fewer pedestrians

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
temporary metal barrier fencing along the walkway edge
linear fluorescent lights illuminating the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower, more enclosed walkway featuring a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the left and metal construction barriers. The lighting becomes more artificial and dimmer, with fewer pedestrians visible and no vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street corner with neon signage and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits narrow graffiti-lined path into open commercial intersection with visible traffic and neon signs
multiple futuristic vehicles including a yellow sports car drive past on the street

agents.ego_description: character walking along open sidewalk passing neon-lit storefronts including a prominent brain wash sign, observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sports car driving past with headlights on

entered.detail: purple and pink neon sign reading 'BRAIN WASH' on building facade
wide street with multiple lanes of traffic and crosswalks
tall palm tree on street median
elevated roadway or transit structure spanning above the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open commercial intersection with visible sky, featuring prominent neon signage including a 'BRAIN WASH' sign, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic. The environment shifts from enclosed to exposed, with futuristic cars driving past and holographic billboards visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a bustling commercial corridor into a secluded alleyway before emerging into an open urban intersection. It begins by following the character along a covered walkway with orange pavement, surrounded by holographic billboards and the hum of adjacent vehicle traffic. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a dimmer, more enclosed space defined by graffiti-covered walls and metal construction barriers where the crowds and traffic fade away. The environment then opens up as the character emerges from the enclosure into a wide intersection under the open sky, where palm trees and prominent neon signs like Brain Wash come into view. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a vibrant cityscape filled with holographic advertisements and futuristic cars driving past in the open air.
